description: Advanced 4D BIM integration, persistent autonomous site monitoring, and structural anomaly detection leveraging Edge AI, high-density point clouds, and cloud-native MLOps architectures.
learning_objectives: Understand construction project lifecycle, BIM workflows, and civil engineering inspection requirements
Build AI models for construction progress comparison vs. BIM, safety PPE detection, defect identification, and volumetric analysis
Create geospatial and 3D data pipelines for photogrammetry, point cloud processing, and BIM integration
Deploy real‑time safety monitoring and inspection analytics on drone edge hardware
Implement automated progress reporting linked to project schedules and BIM models
Comply with site safety regulations (OSHA, EU OHS Directive) and construction airspace restrictions
Continuously update models as construction progresses through distinct phases

modules.title: 4D BIM & Digital Twin Synchronization
modules.description: Align autonomous drone flights with 4D Building Information Models (BIM) to track construction progress versus planned schedules.
topics: Automated Progress Tracking via Point Cloud comparisons (Iterative Closest Point)
Schedule Deviation Alerts & Earned Value Management

modules.title: Edge AI Structural Defect Detection
modules.description: Deploy highly optimized Vision Transformers to classify cracks, spalling, and rebar exposure in real-time.
topics: Vision Transformer (ViT) fine-tuning for concrete anomalies
Multi-modal fusion (Thermal + RGB) for subsurface defects
Deploying TensorRT engines on NVIDIA Jetson Orin
Active Learning loops for rare structural defects

modules.title: Real-time Autonomous Site Safety
modules.description: Monitor dynamic construction sites for safety compliance, including PPE usage and exclusion zone violations.
topics: YOLOv8 custom tracking for PPE (Hardhat/Vest) compliance

modules.title: Drone & Heavy Machinery V2X Coordination
modules.description: Enable vehicle-to-everything (V2X) communication between drones and autonomous ground equipment (e.g., excavators).

capstone_project.name: Construction Progress Intelligence System
capstone_project.description: Monitor a multi‑story building construction project over a simulated 8‑week period using weekly drone surveys. Automatically generate 3D models via SfM, compare progress against BIM, detect PPE violations in real time, and compute earthwork volumes for quantity surveying. Deliver an automated weekly progress report with heat‑map overlays showing ahead/behind schedule zones.
deliverables: Automated SfM pipeline (OpenDroneMap) with COG outputs
Semantic segmentation model for construction element classification

resources.name: OpenDroneMap
resources.description: Open‑source photogrammetry for orthomosaics and 3D models

resources.name: CH‑PPE Dataset
resources.description: Construction worker PPE detection benchmark dataset

glossary.definition: Building Information Modeling. A digital representation of physical and functional characteristics of a facility.
Industry Foundation Classes. An open file format specification that is not controlled by a single vendor or group of vendors.
An algorithm employed to minimize the difference between two clouds of points, used for 3D alignment.
Vehicle-to-everything. Communication between a vehicle and any entity that may affect, or may be affected by, the vehicle.
Person Re-identification. The problem of recognizing moving people across non-overlapping camera networks.
